meaning: adj.不加疑问的,不问是非的,不犹豫的
examples: Isabella had been taught unquestioning obedience.
We have to act in unquestioning obedience to the orders of our superior.
The demand for unquestioning loyalty forces people to become bit players in empty rituals.
Some unquestioning reference to this theory has crept into most reporting on corporate Japan of late.
Another Swiss trait is an innate and unquestioning tendency to identify with their country's institutions and sacred cows.
